summary: CRITICAL REGRESSION FIX VERIFIED: Users section loading deadlock fixed. Removed `&& !loading` condition that created infinite loading state. All 8 admin sections load correctly without getting stuck. All regression tests pass.

bug_fix_verification.issue: Users section stuck on 'Loading users...' indefinitely
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Condition `if (activeSection === 'users' && users.length === 0 && !loading)` created a deadlock. When loading was true from initial state, !loading was false, so fetchUsers never ran, but loading stayed true forever.
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Removed `&& !loading` from the condition in App.js line 1927-1934
bug_fix_verification.fix_verified: YES - Users section now loads correctly without getting stuck

critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: Line 1927-1934 in App.js now correctly checks `if (activeSection === 'users')` and `if (users.length === 0)` without the problematic `&& !loading` condition
fetchUsers is called correctly when switching to Users section with empty user list
context_for_next_testing_agent: EMERGENCY FIX VERIFIED: The Users section deadlock bug has been fixed. The condition in App.js line 1927-1934 no longer includes `&& !loading`, which was causing the infinite loading state. All 8 admin sections now load correctly. Regression tests confirm rapid switching, F5 refresh, and tab functionality all work.
